select_devices.title: Select devices
select_devices.description: Choose which 1Control devices to add to Home Assistant.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to 1Control. Please check your internet connection.
error.no_devices_found: No devices found on this account.
error.no_devices_selected: Please select at least one device.

data_description.auto_close_delay: Seconds after an open command before Home Assistant marks the gate as closed again.
data_description.pin: Optional. If set, the gate is exposed as a lock entity and this PIN must be entered to open or close it. Leave empty for a standard cover entity with no PIN.
data_description.dory_update_interval: How often to poll the 1Control cloud for Dory door sensor state. Lower values give faster updates but increase load on the 1Control API; the cloud-side state only updates as fast as the sensor reports anyway.
